title: MiniScaled
description: Bring your small world with you.
body:
A Fabric mod that provides easy-usable scale boxes using [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) functionality. You can enter the scale box seamlessly without loading screen.

![miniscaled1.png](https://i.loli.net/2021/09/30/J9bBF82tRu5yIkW.png)

This mod requires [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals).

[How to Use This Mod](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/MiniScaled.html)
